summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Careers page registration form with CV file upload. All backend API tests passed (10/10). Frontend UI tests passed - form submission works with and without CV, success modal displays correctly, file upload to Object Storage verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper validation for file types and sizes
Good use of data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Proper error handling with graceful degradation (registration continues even if CV upload fails)
Object Storage integration working correctly with real uploads
seed_data_creation: Test registrations created with TEST_ prefix in career_registrations collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Careers registration with CV upload fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_careers.py cover: registration without CV, registration with PDF/DOCX, missing field validation (name/email/area), invalid file type rejection, file size limit (5MB). Frontend tests verified form elements, file upload display, success modal. Object Storage integration is REAL (not mocked).

frontend: Page load and form elements visibility - PASSED
Form field filling (name, email, area select) - PASSED
Success modal display and close - PASSED
